description_long: This is a compact biplane with two sets of straight, parallel wings supported by vertical struts, giving it a classic vintage appearance. The fuselage is metallic with a slightly rounded, streamlined body and a blue-tinted cockpit canopy positioned near the front. The nose features a prominent, multi-blade propeller in a blue shade, and the tail section is equipped with a horizontal stabilizer and a single vertical fin, both in a light purple color. The landing gear consists of two main wheels under the fuselage and a smaller tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. The surface of the wings and fuselage appears to be made of metal with a slightly matte, weathered finish, while the propeller and tail surfaces are painted. The overall design suggests a lightweight, maneuverable aircraft suitable for short flights or display in an urban park or museum setting.
description: A small, vintage-style biplane with dual black wings, a blue propeller, and a metallic fuselage featuring a blue cockpit and purple tail surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue propeller, dual black wings, and the rounded nose of the airplane.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, the blue cockpit canopy, and the fixed landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the purple tail surfaces, single vertical stabilizer, and the alignment of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tail wheel, wing structure, and the blue propeller from a different angle.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings mounted one above the other, supported by vertical struts; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a multi-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers forming a standard cruciform layout.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat configuration and a blue-tinted canopy.
